def positive_helper_module_accumulates_unrelated_cross_domain_utilities():
    rule_id = "helper_module_accumulates_unrelated_cross_domain_utilities"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag helper modules that mix string, filesystem, caching, parsing, and process logic in one place."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
